mapper.sql: ARTICLE_SEQ AS articleSeq, BOARD_ID AS boardId, CATEGORY_SEQ AS categorySeq, TOP_YN AS topYn, REF_ARTICLE_SEQ AS refArticleSeq, POSITION AS position, STEP AS step, TITLE AS title, WRITER_ID AS writerId, WRITER_NAME AS writerName, READ_CNT AS readCnt, ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_1 AS attachFilePath1, DOWNLOAD_CNT_1 AS downloadCnt1, ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_2 AS attachFilePath2, DOWNLOAD_CNT_2 AS downloadCnt2, ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_3 AS attachFilePath3, DOWNLOAD_CNT_3 AS downloadCnt3, REGIST_DTIME AS registDtime, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, CONTENT AS content

ARTICLE_SEQ AS articleSeq, BOARD_ID AS boardId, CATEGORY_SEQ AS categorySeq, TOP_YN AS topYn, STEP AS step, TITLE AS title, WRITER_NAME AS writerName, READ_CNT AS readCnt, CASE WHEN ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_1 IS NOT NULL OR ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_2 IS NOT NULL OR ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_3 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasAttachment, REGIST_DTIME AS registDtime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM FWK_ARTICLE WHERE ARTICLE_SEQ = #{articleSeq}
SELECT FROM FWK_ARTICLE WHERE REF_ARTICLE_SEQ = #{refArticleSeq} ORDER BY POSITION, ARTICLE_SEQ
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_ARTICLE WHERE ARTICLE_SEQ = #{articleSeq}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_ARTICLE WHERE REF_ARTICLE_SEQ = #{refArticleSeq}
SELECT NVL(MAX(ARTICLE_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM FWK_ARTICLE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_ARTICLE ( ARTICLE_SEQ, BOARD_ID, CATEGORY_SEQ, TOP_YN, REF_ARTICLE_SEQ, POSITION, STEP, TITLE, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, READ_CNT, ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_1, DOWNLOAD_CNT_1, ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_2, DOWNLOAD_CNT_2, ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_3, DOWNLOAD_CNT_3, REGIST_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{articleSeq}, #{dto.boardId}, #{dto.categorySeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.topYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.refArticleSeq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{position}, #{step}, #{dto.title}, #{writerId}, #{writerName}, 0, #{dto.attachFilePath1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{dto.attachFilePath2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{dto.attachFilePath3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{registDtime}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId}, #{dto.content, jdbcType=CLOB} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_ARTICLE SET READ_CNT = READ_CNT + 1 WHERE ARTICLE_SEQ = #{articleSeq}

UPDATE FWK_ARTICLE SET
ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_1 = NULL, DOWNLOAD_CNT_1 = 0 ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_2 = NULL, DOWNLOAD_CNT_2 = 0 ATTATCH_FILE_PATH_3 = NULL, DOWNLOAD_CNT_3 = 0 , LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE ARTICLE_SEQ = #{articleSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM FWK_ARTICLE ORDER BY REGIST_DTIME DESC
SELECT FROM FWK_ARTICLE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY TOP_YN DESC, REF_ARTICLE_SEQ, POSITION, ARTICLE_SEQ DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_ARTICLE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_ARTICLE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}

SELECT USER_ID AS userId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, ARTICLE_SEQ AS articleSeq, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM FWK_ARTICLE_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND ARTICLE_SEQ = #{articleSeq}
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, ARTICLE_SEQ AS articleSeq, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM FWK_ARTICLE_USER ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DTIME DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_ARTICLE_USER (USER_ID, BOARD_ID, ARTICLE_SEQ, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME) VALUES (#{userId}, #{boardId}, #{articleSeq}, #{lastUpdateDtime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FWK_ARTICLE_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND ARTICLE_SEQ = #{articleSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID AS userId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, ARTICLE_SEQ AS articleSeq, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM FWK_ARTICLE_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DTIME DESC
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, ARTICLE_SEQ AS articleSeq, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM FWK_ARTICLE_USER WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DTIME DESC

SELECT USER_ID AS userId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, ARTICLE_SEQ AS articleSeq, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM FWK_ARTICLE_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DTIME DESC
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, ARTICLE_SEQ AS articleSeq, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime FROM FWK_ARTICLE_USER WHERE ARTICLE_SEQ = #{articleSeq} ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DTIME DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_ARTICLE_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_ARTICLE_USER WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
